message:
fix(security): payload-input hash collision in universal_verifier_sdk replay

The replay hash in replay_capsule() and build_reference_capsule() used
string concatenation (payload + "|len:key=len:val") without length-
prefixing the payload itself, allowing collision between a payload
containing delimiter patterns and a shorter payload with those values
in the inputs map.

Replace string-concat approach with proper SHA-256 length-prefixed
encoding via new compute_replay_hash() function, matching the pattern
already used by compute_signing_payload().

Adds 2 regression tests proving collision resistance and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
